headline: Can Monolithic Power Systems’ (MPWR) Upbeat Q1 Setup Clarify Its AI Power Leadership Story?
summary: In late April 2026, Monolithic Power Systems entered the Q1 2026 earnings season with analysts expecting a double-digit bottom-line increase, supported by prior quarters in which both adjusted EPS and revenue exceeded forecasts and management issued revenue guidance of US$770,000,000 to US$790,000,000. Analysts’ positive Earnings ESP of 0.78% and favorable ranking for Monolithic Power Systems highlighted growing confidence that the company could again outperform consensus expectations,...

headline: Seagate, Semis, And E-Commerce: Tradr Doubles Down With New 2X ETFs
summary: The new 2X leveraged ETFs track Seagate, Coupang, and Monolithic Power, giving traders amplified exposure to AI-momentum and high-growth stocks.

headline: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning Monolithic Power Systems Stock In The Last 15 Years
